commands.purpose: Table view of payments. Filterable by tenant, status (derived from amount_refunded + disputes), provider, date range, customer_id (via invoice join). Default limit 100.
Verbose read of one payment: base fields + parent invoice + parent intent + payment_method summary + refunds accumulated + open disputes + linked transaction + billing snapshot. Support tool.

Manual capture for authorization-hold intents (capture_method='manual'). --amount is optional and defaults to the intent's amount (full capture). Partial capture creates a partially_captured event. Requires payment_manual_capture entitlement.

On-demand invocation of ReconcilePaymentIntentsJob. Per active provider: polls provider intent list + reconciles drift. --dry-run reports findings without repairing. Findings above 0 indicate lost webhooks.
Table view of a customer's saved payment methods. --active filters is_active=true. --provider filters by provider slug. Support tool for troubleshooting customer payment flows.
Soft-delete a payment method. --reason IN (customer_removed / card_expired / provider_failure / duplicate / fraud_flag). Dispatches provider-side detach. --note required and written to audit trail.

Table view of in-flight + recent intents. Filterable by status (initialized / requires_action / requires_payment_method / requires_confirmation / requires_capture / processing / succeeded / cancelled / failed). Default sort: created_at DESC.

Manually cancel an in-flight intent (any non-terminal status). --reason IN (requested_by_customer / duplicate / fraudulent / abandoned / expired). Dispatches provider.cancelIntent. --note required and written to audit trail.

Support tool. Confirm an intent on the customer's behalf (typically used when the customer's SDK failed to post the confirmation but the customer completed the flow). --payment-method attaches a method (required if not already attached). --note required.
Table view of disputes. --unresolved filters to non-terminal statuses. Sorted by created_at DESC.
Verbose read of one dispute: base fields + parent payment + evidence (redacted for non-authorized callers) + evidence_due_by countdown + refund/chargeback links (if escalated). Support tool.
Submit collected evidence to the provider. Dispatches SubmitDisputeEvidenceJob. --force bypasses the 'evidence already collected' check (rare — resubmits ONLY where the provider allows).
Concede the dispute WITHOUT fighting. Creates a refund via the refund module + transitions dispute status → 'charge_refunded'. --note required. Every accept writes to audits with 7-year retention.

Scriptable provider config create/update. --config-file=path/to/config.json validated against the per-provider JSON schema. --dry-run validates + shows diff without persisting. Encrypts the config at rest.
